# supplements.neoi.jp
> Education-first guide to how people choose and use supplements in Singapore,
> with a Japan-informed perspective on routines. Not medical advice.
> Official store: https://supplement.neoi.jp

## FAQ
- [Are supplements regulated in Singapore?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/supplements-regulated-singapore)
- [Is it safe to buy supplements online in Singapore?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/buy-supplements-online-singapore-safe)
- [Pharmacy or online: which is better in Singapore?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/pharmacy-vs-online-supplements-singapore)
- [Can you buy melatonin in Singapore?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/buy-melatonin-singapore)
- [Why are Japanese supplements popular in Singapore?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/why-japanese-supplements-popular-singapore)
- [What is the most common supplement mistake?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/common-supplement-mistake-singapore)
- [What does "made in Japan" mean for a supplement?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/what-made-in-japan-means-supplements)
- [What do GMP and ISO certifications mean?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/what-is-gmp-iso-supplement)
- [How do I read a supplement label?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/how-to-read-supplement-label)
- [Collagen in Singapore: pills vs drinks](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/collagen-pills-vs-drinks-singapore)
- [Probiotics in Singapore: Guardian, Watsons or online?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/probiotics-singapore-guardian-watsons-online)
- [Halal supplements in Singapore](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/halal-supplements-singapore)
- [Women's multivitamins: 30+, 40+, 50+](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/womens-multivitamins-age-singapore)
- [What is NMN?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/what-is-nmn)
- [When to take NMN](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/best-time-to-take-nmn)
- [What is royal jelly?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/what-is-royal-jelly)
- [How to avoid fake supplements](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/how-to-spot-fake-supplements)
- [Are supplements medicine?](https://supplements.neoi.jp/faq/are-supplements-medicine)
